description: Replaced Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Added Azure Identity Extensions for managed identity authentication.
Removed Oracle-specific column definitions (NUMBER(19,0) for file_size and TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP for uploaded_at). These are now handled by JPA/Hibernate with database-agnostic types.
Updated database configuration from Oracle to Azure PostgreSQL with managed identity authentication. Removed hardcoded password and added Azure authentication plugin.
Updated Docker-specific configuration from Oracle to Azure PostgreSQL with managed identity authentication.
Updated documentation to reflect Azure PostgreSQL usage instead of Oracle, including configuration instructions and Azure-specific guidance.
